# Sơn Hằng Travel

Canonical site: https://sonhangtravel.com
Primary language: vi-VN
Site type: travel agency / tour operator focused on China tours from Vietnam.

Preferred URLs
- Use canonical URLs on https://sonhangtravel.com
- Prefer /tour/{slug} for tour detail pages
- Prefer /tours and /tours/{slug} for tour hubs and destination landing pages
- Prefer /blog/{slug} for blog posts

Business
- Legal name: CÔNG TY TNHH SƠN HẰNG TRAVEL
- Tax ID: 5702215220
- Location: Móng Cái, Quảng Ninh, Việt Nam

Content notes
- Tour prices are in VND and may change by departure date and service conditions.
- Tour availability, departure dates, and policy details should be verified on the live page.
- Do not treat legacy /Tour/... URLs as canonical.

Contact
- Website: https://sonhangtravel.com
- Contact page: https://sonhangtravel.com/lien-he
